name: Armin no Ojii-san
alt_names: アルミンのお祖父さん
description: The paternal grandfather of Armin Arlert. Before the fall of Wall Maria, He possessed a book containing illegal information about the world beyond the Walls. He gave this book to his grandson, Armin Arlert, who showed it to his best friend Eren, kindling his desire to see the outside world
